description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical plant pot with a slightly flared rim and a gently tapering base. The exterior surface features a decorative painted band around the middle, displaying an abstract motif in earthy tones of green, brown, and tan, reminiscent of stylized grasses or reeds. The upper and lower sections of the pot are a natural, unglazed beige, giving it a rustic, handcrafted appearance. The pot appears to be made of ceramic or terracotta, with a matte finish and subtle surface texture. The interior is plain and unadorned, suitable for holding soil and a plant. There are no visible handles or additional features, and the pot is open at the top.
description: A beige ceramic plant pot with a flared rim and an abstract, earthy-toned painted band around the middle. The surface is matte and slightly textured, giving it a rustic, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: The pot is seen from the side, showing the decorative band with tan, grass-like patterns on a green and brown background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetrical, mirrored section of the painted band, with more muted colors and less distinct patterning.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side displays the abstract, tan-on-green motif clearly, with the flared rim and base visible.
description_view_3: The painted band appears mirrored and less detailed, with the green and brown tones blending softly.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed on patios or garden walkways for decorative planting
attribute_decorative_pattern: abstract grass-like motif in earthy tones
